Notice Of Motion And Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice, And Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice
Off Calendar Aug-19-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF JOSE MARTINEZ'S Motion To Voluntarily Dismiss Plaintiff'S Individual Claims With Prejudice, And Class And Paga Claims Without Prejudice.

Plainitff's unopposed motion to voluntarily dismiss Plaintiff's individual claims with prejudice, and class and PAGA claims without prejudice is granted.

Order is signed.

Judge: Vedica Puri: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/VP)

MINI MINUTES:

Tyler J. Johnson, Esq. of SHEPPARD MULLIN RICHTER & HAMPTON, LLP, T:213.617.5479, for defendant/ moving party, on Court Call;
No other appearance.

RULING: There being no opposition, the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS WOODLAND CLINIC MEDICAL CENTER, DIGNITY HEALTH, DIGNITY COMMUNITY CARE's Motion To Stay Action On Grounds Of Another Similar Action Pending is Granted. No opposition filed.

Order signed in open court.
